name: Service Department Handler
description: n8n Workflow: Receives service department inquiries via webhook, classifies service type (booking/status/recall/FAQ), generates response using Prompt #3 (Service BDC Agent), runs compliance check, sends SMS, and updates CRM. Based on Prompt #3 from the top-20-prompts-arsenal.
flow_diagram: Service Inquiry Webhook -> Classify Service Type -> Generate Service Response (Prompt #3) -> Compliance Check -> IF(pass) -> [Send SMS, Update CRM] | IF(fail) -> [Log Compliance Failure]
